description_long: This is a wooden bucket or tankard with a cylindrical body constructed from vertical wooden staves, giving it a classic, rustic appearance. The exterior is reinforced by two prominent metallic bands, each secured with large, round-headed bolts, adding both structural integrity and a decorative touch. A robust, angular handle made of metal is attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping and carrying. The top is open, revealing the hollow interior, and the rim is slightly uneven, mimicking the look of hand-crafted woodwork. The wood grain is visible, with a warm brown color, while the metal bands and handle are a contrasting silvery-gray. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative engravings on the surface.
description: A rustic wooden bucket or tankard with metal bands and a sturdy metal handle, featuring visible wood grain and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden body, two metal bands with bolts, and the full metal handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle directly facing the viewer, obscuring most of the wooden surface behind it.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the wooden body, both metal bands, and the handle on the left side.
description_view_3: Back view showing only the wooden body and metal bands, with the handle not visible.
